title: `alal #5954
definition:
1) to thrust in, go in, come in
    1a) (P'al) to go in, come in
    1b) (Aphel) to bring in
    1c) (Hophal) to be brought in
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to thrust in, go in, come in
    1a) (P'al) to go in, come in
    1b) (Aphel) to bring in
    1c) (Hophal) to be brought in

    NASB:  to go or come in
